description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests. Use three jobs to build on different operating systems: build-linux on ubuntu-20.04 and ubuntu-22.04, build-macos on macos-12 and macos-13, and build-windows on windows-latest. For each job, check out the repository and install dependencies before building with make or using CMake and vcpkg.
